<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the current state after game over
print("Step:", current_frame.step)
print("Level:", current_frame.level)
print("Shape:", current_frame.shape)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAll nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 5:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}... children={n['children']}")

# Check ASCII for layout
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Full board summary ===")
print("Top 5 rows:")
for r in range(5):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r]}'")
print("Bottom 10 rows:")
for r in range(54, 64):
    print(f"  Row {r}: '{ascii_lines[r]}'")

# Check last action result
print("\nLast action result:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
